devnotes.summary: Abstract base unit for plant submodels
devnotes.remarks: This unit defines the abstract base class for plant submodels and related soil submodels. It includes properties and methods for managing plant growth, soil interactions, and environmental parameters.
devnotes.author: HUME Development Team

devnotes.summary: maximum number of soil layers
maximum number of rooted compartments
Source of extinction coefficient / rc0 / Psi2 / Weff
abstract type for plant related soil submodels
first plant model from a possible list of
actual plant submodel instance
getter to check if a plant model is set
devnotes.returns: boolean indicating if a plant model is set

devnotes.summary: setter for the plant model
devnotes.remarks: This method sets the plant model and initializes the first plant model if not already set.

devnotes.summary: initialization method for the submodel
property to access the plant model
devnotes.remarks: This property allows access to the current plant model instance.
This property allows setting the plant model for the submodel.

devnotes.summary: base class for plant components interacting with soil components
abstract base type for plant submodel
next crop in the rotation
devnotes.remarks: This property holds a reference to the next crop in the rotation.

devnotes.summary: flag to indicate if new sowing and harvest dates should be set for the next crop
pointer to soil water & nitrogen module
THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values.
devnotes.remarks: Extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

devnotes.summary: THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values.
devnotes.remarks: Extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

devnotes.summary: THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values.
devnotes.remarks: Extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

devnotes.summary: THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values.
devnotes.remarks: Extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

devnotes.summary: THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values.
devnotes.remarks: Extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

devnotes.summary: THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values.
devnotes.remarks: Extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

devnotes.summary: Total dry matter
Fine root dry matter
C residues [g C/m2]
N residues [g N/m2]
Do harvest
Harvested?
Parameter sowing date (TPar object) [day]
Parameter harvest date (TPar object) [day]
Parameter water potential at which water uptake by the plant starts to decrease (only valid if SoilWaterModel uses Option Opt_Psi2=fromPlantModel)
Parameter Canopy resistance at potential transpiration (only valid if EvapotranspirationModel uses Option Opt_rc0=fromPlantModel)
Extinction coefficient for PAR (only valid if EvapotranspirationModel uses Option Opt_Exk_Glob = fromPlantModel)
Effective rooting depth [cm] (only valid if SoilWaterModel uses Option Opt_Weff=fromPlantModel)
Pointer array to root length density data
Option added HK 2025/03/20
Integrates the plant model state variables and performs harvest if conditions are met
devnotes.remarks: This method checks if the harvest date has been reached or if harvesting is triggered. If so, it sets the harvested flag, adds residues to the soil model, and prepares the next crop for planting. It also resets state variables and updates sowing and harvest dates based on the rotation lengt furthermore it moves pointer of coupled submodels to the next crop in the rotation.

devnotes.summary: Initializes the plant model with global model parameters
devnotes.remarks: This method sets the initial conditions for the plant model harvest status, and residue states. It also ensures that the harvest date is set correctly relative to the sowing date.

devnotes.summary: Extinction coefficient for photosynthetically active radiation
Extinction coefficient for global radiation
Canopy resistance at potential transpiration
Water potential at which water uptake by the plant starts to decrease
Effective rooting depth [cm]
getter for root length density in a certain soil layser
propterty for total root length
devnotes.remarks: This property returns the total root length of the plant.

devnotes.summary: Property for effective root length
devnotes.remarks: This property returns the effective root length of the plant. The effective root length is the root length that is actively taking up water and nutrients.

devnotes.summary: property for leaf area index (LAI)
devnotes.remarks: This property returns the leaf area index of the plant.

devnotes.summary: property for crop height
property for total dry matter growth rate
property for nitrogen uptake rate
property for soil mineralisation sub model linked to the plant
property for evapotranspiration sub model linked to the plant
property for dry matter production sub model linked to the plant
property for soil nitrogen sub model linked to the plant
